mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.file_url AS fileUrl, p.user_id AS userId, u.username AS authorName, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, p.ethnic_group AS ethnicGroup, p.region, p.visibility, p.comments, p.collects, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.top, p.create_time AS createTime, p.modify_time AS modifyTime, (SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(t.name) FROM post_tag pt JOIN tags t ON pt.tag_id = t.id WHERE pt.post_id = p.id) AS tags FROM post p JOIN post_tag pt ON p.id = pt.post_id JOIN tags t ON pt.tag_id = t.id JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE t.name = #{tagName} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
